allow: Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "from livestudio.config.manager import ConfigManager; from livestudio.services.animations.controllers.vtubestudio.mouth_sync import MouthSyncController; print\('imports OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(p, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for p in ['livestudio/log.py','livestudio/config/manager.py','livestudio/clients/vtube_studio/client.py','livestudio/tween/engine.py']]; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import livestudio; from livestudio.tween.engine import ParameterTweenEngine; from livestudio.clients.vtube_studio.client import VTubeStudioClient; from livestudio.config.manager import ConfigManager; from livestudio.utils.log import logger, configure_logging; print\('IMPORT OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import flet, sounddevice; print\('flet', flet.__version__\); print\('sounddevice OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import flet, sounddevice, numpy, loguru; print\('all backend+gui deps import OK in venv'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from livestudio.gui import core; print\('core OK'\); print\(sorted\(core.__all__\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from livestudio.gui import core; print\('core OK'\); print\(len\(core.__all__\), 'exports'\)")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-10\) } | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId=93956 OR ProcessId=97860\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Id 93956,97860 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='python.exe' OR Name='pythonw.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m py_compile livestudio/gui/__init__.py livestudio/gui/main.py livestudio/gui/core/*.py livestudio/gui/views/*.py livestudio/gui/components/*.py)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -like '\\''*VTube*'\\'' -or $_.ProcessName -like '\\''*VTubeStudio*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 8000 -and $_.LocalPort -le 8010 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize')

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8554 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; "listeners on 8554: " + \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8554 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8555 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; "listeners on 8555: " + \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8555 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8556 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; "stopped")

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8557 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; "stopped")

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8558 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; "stopped")

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8559 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; "stopped")
